title: Intraperitoneal LPS or Poly(I:C) injection and monitoring of mice
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bbtut","text":"This protocol describes the induction of systemic inflammation in mice using intraperitoneal injections of LPS or Poly(I:C). It includes drug preparation, injection procedures, post-injection monitoring (sepsis scoring and body weight) over several days. This approach is used to model bacterial-like and viral-like immune responses in vivo.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"1vb2o","text":"Drugs: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"14lfs","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"577mg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5iibq","text":"Material:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ea4j","text":"- U-100 Insulin Syringe, with Micro-Fine Intravenous Needle","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8bp5h","text":"- 1mL Syringe with Needle","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"976t","text":"- Scale ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"A_1":{"className":"_dt-bold"},"B_1":{"className":"_dt-bold"},"C_1":{"className":"_dt-bold"}},"colTitles":["","",""],"colWidths":[100,100,100],"data":[["Drugs","Cat","Provider"],["LPS from E.coli O111:B4","tlrl-eblps","Invivogen"],["High molecular weight Poly(I:C)","tlrl-pic","Invivogen"],["Saline","184-116","Kimberly Clarck"]],"guid":"C4F0D55E1B794520941C1AE4B00A4972","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["Drugs","Cat","Provider"],["LPS from E.coli O111:B4","tlrl-eblps","Invivogen"],["High molecular weight Poly(I:C)","tlrl-pic","Invivogen"],["Saline","184-116","Kimberly Clarck"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: LPS from E.coli O111:B4 was reconstituted at 5 mg/mL in the provided endotoxin-free water and frozen at -20 °C . The day of the experiment, LPS was diluted at 1 mg/mL in saline.
Sepsis scoring, based on the table below, was conducted blindly at 6h and 3 days following each injection. %s %s
Mice were monitored for their body weight before the injection and 3-5 days following each injection.

Mice were weighted and injected intraperitoneally at - 3 mg/kg for LPS ( 3 µL/g ) with an insuline syringe - 20 mg/kg for Poly(I:C) ( 20 µL/g ) with a 1mL syringe Control mice received saline (at 3 µL/g or 20 µL/g ).

High molecular weight Poly(I:C) was reconstituted at 1 mg/mL in the provided endotoxin-free physiological water (NaCl 0.9%), heated for 00:10:00 at 65-70 °C , slowly cooled down and frozen at -20 °C .
creator: Amandine Even
